description_long: This object is a rectangular book with a thick, blocky appearance, resting horizontally with a vertical rectangular protrusion at its center. The cover is predominantly black with large, bold, light blue text spanning most of the surface, creating a striking visual contrast. The vertical section appears to be a part of the book, possibly a slipcase or an attached display, and features a triangular cutout and some subtle markings. The edges of the book are white, with a slightly uneven, textured look, suggesting a paperback or softcover format. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, likely intended to attract attention in an urban environment. The book's cover is visually busy, with no prominent illustration apart from the typographic elements.
description: A thick, rectangular book with a bold black and light blue typographic cover and a central vertical protrusion, featuring white textured edges.
description_view_0: The front view shows the book's cover with large blue text and a central vertical block with a triangular cutout.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the thickness of the book and the full width of the blue text, with the vertical block clearly attached.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back cover, continuing the blue text motif, and the plain side of the vertical block.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the book's edge and the vertical block, with the blue text wrapping around the cover.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is white with some dark edging and appears to have minimal or no visible text or decoration. The design is plain and lacks distinct patterns.
